business_context.analysis_summary: This is a mid-to-upscale restaurant with strong food and ambiance but recurring customer frustrations around reservation reliability, service consistency, pricing transparency, and responsiveness to complaints.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Prices, especially for specials and online menus, are not displayed transparently, leading to customer confusion and surprise charges.
supporting_reviews: Found this place on Google Maps and the photos looked great. The interior is stunning when you walk in. But the menu was confusing and the prices were not shown clearly online.
Bill came with a service charge already added and it was not mentioned by our server. When I questioned it the manager was defensive. I would have tipped generously but this felt sneaky.
Ordered the fish special and it was listed as market price on the menu. Was not told what that meant before ordering. The bill was a shock. Felt deliberately misleading.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Online reservation system does not reliably record or confirm bookings.
supporting_reviews: Online reservation system is broken. I booked 2 weeks in advance and when I arrived they had no record of it. Had to wait an hour. The manager offered no apology or compensation.
Tried to call and make a reservation but nobody answered. Eventually booked through the website but the confirmation email never arrived. Stressful before we even got there.
Sent a complaint via their website contact form three weeks ago and still no response. This is the second time service has let us down. They clearly do not value returning customers.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Customers perceive reduced portion sizes, increased prices, and changes to signature dishes, leading to dissatisfaction with overall value and quality.
supporting_reviews: I have been coming here for 3 years and the quality has really dropped. The portions are smaller and prices are higher. The signature dish is not the same anymore.
Waited 45 minutes for a table even with a reservation. The hostess was rude and dismissive when we asked for an update. Not acceptable for a place charging these prices.
Food was decent but nothing special. The main course arrived lukewarm and when we mentioned it the waiter just shrugged. Expected better for the price point.
Toilets were dirty and one cubicle was out of order. For a restaurant of this calibre that is unacceptable. Food was good but I kept thinking about the state of the bathrooms.

recommendations.recommendation: Update all menus (in-restaurant, online, and for specials) to clearly display accurate and up-to-date pricing, including for limited-time offers and add-ons.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduces customer confusion and surprise charges, increasing trust and satisfaction during menu selection.
recommendations.evidence: "We were shocked by the bill because the specials had no prices listed anywhere."

recommendations.recommendation: Audit and upgrade the online reservation system to ensure bookings are reliably recorded and confirmation emails/texts are automatically sent to customers.
recommendations.expected_impact: Minimizes booking errors, reduces customer frustration, and improves first impressions.
recommendations.evidence: "I booked online but when we arrived, they had no record of our reservation."

recommendations.recommendation: Standardize portion sizes and review pricing strategy to ensure alignment with customer expectations; communicate any changes to signature dishes transparently.
recommendations.expected_impact: Restores perceived value, reduces negative reviews about quality, and increases repeat visits.
recommendations.evidence: "The portions are smaller and prices higher, and my favorite dish just isn't the same anymore."

recommendations.recommendation: Implement a regular review process for all digital and printed customer touchpoints to ensure information accuracy and consistency.
recommendations.expected_impact: Prevents outdated or inconsistent information from reaching customers, reducing confusion and complaints.
recommendations.evidence: "The online menu didn't match what we saw in the restaurant."

recommendations.recommendation: Introduce a post-dining feedback prompt (digital or in-person) to capture emerging issues and address them proactively.
recommendations.pain_point_addressed: Declining quality and value, Issue group 0
recommendations.expected_impact: Enables early detection of new pain points and continuous improvement of the customer experience.
recommendations.evidence: "I wish they asked for feedback, maybe they'd know about these problems."

evaluation.critique: Evaluation parse error, approving by default.
